name: Crab Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and form into small cakes.
2. Heat butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
3. Add the crab cake mixture and flatten slightly with a spatula.
4. Cook for 3-4 minutes on each side or until golden brown and cooked through.
5. Serve hot with tarragon sauce.
